$schema_doc: Fix report template written to <run_dir>/fix-report-[n].json by agent-fix Step 7. Records every fix attempted in a run: what was approved, what was applied, what failed, and what was skipped as ambiguous. Use to compare across audit runs and track repair history.

fixes_failed.error: <error message from the Edit or Write tool>

ambiguous_flagged.reason: <why the repair action could not be determined from the artifact alone>

$field_rules.fixes_applied: One entry per Fix ID that was approved and successfully written. Include all merged findings in finding_ids.
$field_rules.fixes_failed: One entry per Fix ID that was approved but failed during the Edit/Write step. Include the raw tool error.
$field_rules.ambiguous_flagged: One entry per finding that was classified as ambiguous and skipped. Never include findings that were simply unapproved by the user — only truly ambiguous ones.
$field_rules.summary.approved_by_user: Count of fixes the user approved (subset of total_fixes_in_plan). Excludes ambiguous_flagged.
$field_rules.summary.p0_applied: Count of P0 severity fixes that were successfully applied. A run with p0_applied < p0_total is still at risk.
$field_rules.severity_values: P0 = blocker (safety, repeated failed assertion), P1 = major (single failed assertion, lint error), P2 = minor (advisory, quality gap)
